archetype.rationale: Mid-to-upper pricing with priced menu, terrace dining, and reviews focused on dish quality and proper Roman technique — contemporary trattoria, not neighborhood counter.

runner_up_rejected.name: LUXURY
runner_up_rejected.reason: €13–22 mains and walk-in lunch service; no tasting menu or reservation-only model.

customer_type.value: Tourists and locals seeking proper Roman pasta
customer_type.evidence: reviews mention terrace and guanciale quality

main_selling_point.value: Tableside cacio e pepe and guanciale-based Roman pastas

competitive_advantage.value: Terrace seating on Via del Corso with honest house wine

design_direction.tone: Confident and efficient — quality pasta without ceremony
design_direction.color: Deep green and burgundy from signage and wine labels
design_direction.imagery_priority: Pasta and terrace over generic dining room
